module_sme_rollup.description: Establish and maintain project structure, scope, and governance from initiation to closure.

statements.text: Create and maintain project master records with status lifecycle, phases, milestones, and customer linkage.
Define project scope, objectives, KPIs, and budgets at project initiation.
Save completed projects as reusable templates with auto-scheduled tasks.
Capture, assess, and approve change orders with automatic plan and budget updates.
statements.rationale: Control scope creep and maintain accuracy

module_sme_rollup.name: Work Execution
module_sme_rollup.description: Assign, schedule, and track work with visibility into progress, dependencies, and resource allocation.

statements.text: Create and assign tasks with priority, due date, dependencies, and subtask hierarchies.
statements.rationale: Decompose work and guide team focus

statements.text: Monitor task status, completion progress, and work-in-progress across team in real time.
Display interactive Gantt chart with critical path, baseline, and drag-and-drop scheduling.
Allocate team members to projects and tasks with availability and capacity visibility.
Detect circular dependencies and recalculate dependent task dates on schedule changes.
Send email and in-app notifications for task assignments, updates, and deadline reminders.
statements.rationale: Keep team informed and on track

module_sme_rollup.name: Time, Cost & Billing
module_sme_rollup.description: Track labor and expenses, manage budgets, and generate accurate client invoices.

statements.text: Log hours against projects and tasks with billable classification and approval workflow.
statements.rationale: Accurate labor cost and billing foundation

statements.text: Capture and approve expense claims by project with policy validation and reimbursement tracking.
statements.rationale: Control costs and reimburse staff accurately

statements.text: Define and apply role, employee, and project-specific billing and cost rates.
statements.rationale: Flexible pricing and accurate cost allocation

statements.text: Track project budget by category and alert when spending reaches configurable thresholds.
Calculate labor costs from timesheets and forecast final project cost based on trends.
Generate invoices from time-and-materials, fixed-price milestones, or progress claims.
statements.rationale: Flexible billing models for diverse projects

statements.text: Report unbilled time and expenses for review before invoicing and post to accounts receivable.

module_sme_rollup.name: Visibility & Control
module_sme_rollup.description: Monitor project health, risks, and performance with dashboards, reporting, and governance.

statements.text: Display project health dashboard with RAG status, budget variance, and milestone tracking.
Report resource utilization, capacity, and on-time/on-budget completion rates.
Record risks with probability, impact, and mitigation plans; track through defined states.
Log issues with severity, owner, and resolution date; escalate high-severity automatically.
Maintain complete version history and activity feed of documents, tasks, and comments.
Export reports to PDF and CSV; drill down from portfolio to task level.

module_sme_rollup.name: Collaboration & Governance
module_sme_rollup.description: Enable team communication, customer engagement, and enforce approval workflows.

statements.text: Enable threaded comments, mentions, and activity feed on tasks, projects, and documents.
Store and manage file attachments with version history and cloud storage integration.
statements.rationale: Single source of truth for project documents

statements.text: Configure multi-level approval workflows with mandatory field validation and escalation.
Provide customer portal for milestone viewing, deliverable approval, and change requests.
Maintain contractor register and link sub-contracts to project phases with cost tracking.

module_sme_rollup.name: Platform & Integration
module_sme_rollup.description: Ensure system accessibility, security, and integration with enterprise tools.

statements.text: Provide web and mobile access with responsive design and push notifications.
Implement role-based access control, single sign-on, and two-factor authentication.
Encrypt data at rest and in transit; maintain audit logs of access and modifications.
Import and export projects via CSV/Excel; provide REST API for third-party integrations.
Synchronize project data with accounting, calendar, and HR systems automatically.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your project data is secure, accessible anywhere, and can flow in and out of your other business systems. Singapore SMEs handle sensitive client and employee information, so PDPA compliance, encryption, and role-based access control are non-negotiable. A construction firm needs to pull supplier data into projects and export timesheets to payroll; a consulting firm needs mobile access so field teams can update tasks from client sites.

Project Core.narrative: This is the backbone of project management—it lets you break down work into tasks, assign them to team members, track progress, and keep everyone aligned through shared documents and notifications. Without it, projects slip into chaos: deadlines are missed, scope creeps, and team members don't know what they're supposed to be doing. A marketing agency uses templates to spin up campaigns faster; a software house uses Kanban boards to manage sprints and keep developers focused.

Time & Resources.narrative: This family captures who is working on what, for how long, and at what cost—critical for billing clients accurately and understanding whether your team is overloaded or underutilised. Singapore SMEs often bill by the hour or by milestone, so time tracking and resource scheduling directly affect cash flow and profitability. A design studio needs to know if designers are fully booked before promising a new client a delivery date; a consulting firm needs to track billable versus non-billable hours to calculate project margins.

Financial Control.narrative: This family ties project spending to budgets and turns project data into client invoices—the bridge between delivery and revenue. SMEs live or die by project profitability, so tracking costs against budget and automating billing reduces admin overhead and catches budget overruns early. A construction contractor uses change orders to formally document scope changes and their cost impact before work starts; a software vendor uses milestone billing to invoice as features are delivered.

Delivery & Tracking.narrative: This family gives you visibility into project schedules, risks, and customer sign-offs—so you can spot delays before they happen and keep clients in the loop. Gantt charts and dependency management help you plan realistic timelines; risk registers and issue tracking help you stay ahead of problems. A logistics firm uses Gantt charts to coordinate multi-phase warehouse moves; a professional services firm uses customer portals so clients can approve deliverables without email ping-pong.

Analytics & Reporting.narrative: This family turns raw project data into dashboards and reports that tell you which projects are profitable, which teams are stretched, and where to focus next. SME leaders need quick answers—'Are we on track?' 'Which client types make us the most money?'—without waiting for a data analyst. A recruitment firm uses profitability reports to see which job placements are most lucrative; a consulting firm uses utilisation dashboards to spot bench time and plan hiring.
